hero.subtitle: The smartest question bank to test your knowledge, review detailed explanations, and prepare for clinical practice.
hero.descriptionLine1: Practice with high-yield questions designed to challenge your understanding.
hero.descriptionLine2: Track your progress and master every specialty.
hero.imageAlt: Medical student studying on a laptop

howItWorks.title: How MedQ Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select from various medical fields to focus your study session.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Answer high-yield questions designed to challenge your understanding.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Review detailed explanations for every answer and track your progress over time.

footer.tagline: Master medical concepts and ace your exams.

login.title: Sign in to MedQ
login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

practice.noQuestions: You've completed all available questions. Check back later!
practice.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact the administrator.
practice.notSignedIn: Please sign in to start practicing.
practice.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
practice.resetConfirmBody: This will delete all your answers for {specialty}. You'll start from scratch.
practice.allAnswered: You've answered all questions in this specialty!

questions.title: Questions
questions.empty: No questions yet — add the first one.
questions.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes the question and any answers linked to it.

fields.tagsHelp: Comma-separated. Lowercased and trimmed on save.

errors.correctIndexRange: Pick one of the four choices.

admin.notAdmin: You don't have access to this area.
